# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"
  CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT: "test.sh"
  CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy.sh"

before_script:
  - echo "Running custom build scripts from repository"
  - chmod +x $CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT
  - chmod +x $CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT
  - chmod +x $CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Executing custom build script"
    - ./$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Executing custom test script"
    - ./$CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Executing custom deploy script"
    - ./$CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-app.com

custom_build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Running custom build process"
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        ./$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom build script found, using default build"
        # Default build commands can be added here
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/

custom_test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running custom test process"
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        ./$CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom test script found, using default test"
        # Default test commands can be added here
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/

custom_deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Running custom deploy process"
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        ./$CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found, using default deploy"
        # Default deploy commands can be added here
      fi
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-app.com
